pillars.title: Operational Excellence
pillars.description: Enables operational best practices with infrastructure as code, monitoring, and automated management.

pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Implements security best practices for cloud infrastructure with network isolation, IAM roles, and secure access patterns.

pillars.title: Performance Efficiency
pillars.description: Optimizes resource utilization and performance with scalable compute resources and efficient networking.

pillars.title: Sustainability
pillars.description: Supports sustainable practices through efficient resource utilization and regional service usage.

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Ensures high availability and fault tolerance with multi-AZ deployment and automated recovery mechanisms.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Balances cost efficiency with reliability through appropriate resource sizing and usage-based pricing.
